title: PvP Performance Modpack
description:
Performance PvP and Crystal PvP Optimized Mod pack centered around Vulcan
1.21.11 Has Both Vulkan And Sodium
Sodium And Vulkan Out!
26.x Out Now -Sodium
Vulkan 26.x Coming Soon
body:
![Picture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83cd867203bdfa015344bb0a2c00ff7b29c31007.png)
Modpack made by Destiny07355. (IGN: Destiny073)

**Performance PvP Modpack**
hyper-optimized / competitive / combat based modpack for Fabric

A hyper-optimized PvP based modpack where framerates & clarity rule the arena.

You drop into a high-stakes PvP arena.
You quickly realize that you need to maximize your **framerates** & reduce **latency**.
Visual clutter and micro-stutters become your worst enemies pretty soon.
Your vanilla client is holding you back, so you upgrade your engine to increase your **competitive edge**.
That's where your domination begins.

### Features
🚀 **Performance** - buttery-smooth framerates, faster chunk loading, and overhauled rendering via VulkanMod.[Sodium Modpack for 1.21.11 Upcoming] 
⚔️ **Combat** - heavily targeted optimizations for crystal placements, anchor detonations, and elytra flights.
🌐 **Network** - lightning-fast packet handling and network stacking to keep your connection stable.
👁️ **Clarity** - clean, unobtrusive visuals with lowered fire, smaller shields, and removed explosion particles.
🎒 **Quality of Life** - faster inventory rendering and streamlined menus to ease your gameplay.
🛠️ **Ready to Play** - no need to spend hours researching or debugging, just install and launch.

### Known Bugs
* **Iris Shaders Crash:** Make sure you do not install Iris, as it will crash the modpack.[Only with Modpacks including Vulkan]
* **Config Tweaks Required:** Make sure to customize the mod configs in-game via Mod Menu so that you use them to their fullest potential.

<details>
<summary>❓ FAQ & Troubleshooting</summary>

* **Shaders:** Iris Shaders is **NOT** supported in this modpack.[Only for modpacks with vulkan]
* **Performance:** If facing problems, the most commonly encountered problem can be fixed by this JVM argument:
  `-Dorg.lwjgl.system.stackSize=256 -XX:+UseG1GC -XX:+ParallelRefProcEnabled -XX:MaxGCPauseMillis=200 -XX:+UnlockExperimentalVMOptions -XX:+DisableExplicitGC -XX:+AlwaysPreTouch -XX:G1NewSizePercent=30 -XX:G1MaxNewSizePercent=40 -XX:G1HeapRegionSize=8M -XX:G1ReservePercent=20 -XX:G1MixedGCLiveThresholdPercent=90 -XX:InitiatingHeapOccupancyPercent=15`
* **Support:** A Sub-Reddit has been Created and is ready. Please make sure to post and expect responses within a few days

</details>
